titleZh: 中国公司法修订与PE/VC投资实务
titleEn: Chinese Company Law Amendment: Impact on PE and VC Investment
abstractZh: 结合新《公司法》修订，讨论优先股分类、资本充实要求与股东退出安排中的争议条款，给出PE/VC交易层面的治理设计建议。
abstractEn: Discusses post-amendment issues important to PE/VC investors, including share classes, shareholder remedies, capital discipline, and strengthened duties of management.
